text.autoconfig.mtr-optimizer.title: MTR Optimizer Settings
text.autoconfig.mtr-optimizer.option.ena: Cache rail and catenary data into VRAM (Video Memory).
Significantly reduces CPU load. Recommended to enable.
Merge Draw Call for trains of the same model, significant improvement for large stations.
Use QuickJS instead of the Java built-in script engine.
Accelerate PIDS sign dynamic texture generation. Automatically downgrade if loading fails.
text.autoconfig.mtr-optimizer.option.sig: How many ticks to allow the sign to redraw once. The larger the value, the better the performance, but the animation may stutter.(20 Ticks = 1 second)
